# Travel Planner

## Summary
The `TravelPlanner` card definition provides a comprehensive dashboard for managing and tracking details of a user's trip. It includes features for managing destinations, travelers, daily itinerary, flight bookings, expenses, and overall trip budget.

## Import
```javascript
import { TravelPlanner } from '../travel-planner';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the `TravelPlanner` card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can include it like this:

```json
{
  "type": "fields",
  "id": "trip-planner",
  "attributes": {
    "field": {
      "type": "@cardstack/skills/Skill/boxel-development#TravelPlanner",
      "data": {
        "tripName": "Summer Vacation",
        "destination": "Paris, France",
        "startDate": "2023-06-15",
        "endDate": "2023-06-25",
        "totalBudget": 5000,
        "currency": "USD",
        "travelers": [
          {
            "name": "John Doe",
            "email": "john@example.com",
            "phone": "+1 123 456 7890",
            "passportNumber": "ABC12345",
            "dateOfBirth": "1985-03-15",
            "role": "lead"
          },
          {
            "name": "Jane Doe",
            "email": "jane@example.com",
            "phone": "+1 987 654 3210",
            "passportNumber": "XYZ54321",
            "dateOfBirth": "1990-07-20",
            "role": "companion"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Template Usage
Inside a consuming card or field template, you can display the `TravelPlanner` card like this:

```handlebars
<@fields.trip-planner @format='isolated' />
```

The `@format='isolated'` option will render the full-featured travel planner experience. Alternatively, you can use `@format='embedded'` or `@format='fitted'` to display more compact versions of the travel planner.
